# Security policy

The full security policy lives at [`docs/contributing/SECURITY.md`](../docs/contributing/SECURITY.md).

**Report vulnerabilities** via one of:

1. **GitHub Security Advisory** (preferred): <https://github.com/scottgl9/skelm/security/advisories/new>
2. **Email**: <scottgl@gmail.com> with `[skelm security]` in the subject line.

See [`docs/contributing/SECURITY.md`](../docs/contributing/SECURITY.md) for scope, threat model, and disclosure timelines.
